info.title: Tyro RBAC API
info.description: Enterprise permission-based RBAC API with features, modules, tasks, notes, activity logs, and notifications.

get.summary: Get a single activity log entry with subject and causer

post.summary: Authenticate user and return Sanctum token

get.summary: Get current authenticated user with roles and module permissions
Get centralized dashboard stats for the current user
Get a single feature with modules
Get a login audit entry (super-admin only)

post.summary: Create a module under a feature

get.summary: Get a single module with feature and permissions
List role permissions for a module

post.summary: Create or update permissions for a role on a module (upsert)

delete.summary: Remove all permissions for a role on a module

get.summary: Get current user permissions for a specific module
Get current user permissions across all modules
Get a specific user permissions across all modules (admin)

200.description: All module permissions for specified user

get.summary: List global notes (not attached to any entity)

post.summary: Create a global note (not attached to any feature/module)

get.summary: List notes attached to a feature

post.summary: Create a note attached to a feature

get.summary: List notes attached to a module

post.summary: Create a note attached to a module

get.summary: List all notifications for the authenticated user
List unread notifications for the authenticated user

post.summary: Mark a single notification as read
Send password reset link to email

get.summary: List users for report filter (super-admin only)
List tasks — filtered by user permissions

post.summary: Create a task (requires can_create on the module)

get.summary: List tasks assigned to the current user
Get task counts by status for the current user

post.summary: Store a new password entry (encrypted at rest)

password.description: Plain text password — encrypted before storage

put.summary: Update vault entry (re-encrypt if password changed)

sanctum.description: Enter Sanctum token in format: Bearer {token}
sanctum.name: Authorization
